meta.valuation_rule: in-kind distribution valued at ratio x child consolidated close on the parent's ex-distribution session, credited as reinvestable cash that session (assumption A-17)
meta.context_note: GEV investigated (decision D-1 list): GEV is itself the distributed child of GE's 2024-04-02 spin-off (GE not in roster); no parent-side event exists for GEV holders in-window — its T-D3 divergence was a price-feed issue resolved under D-3, not a corporate action
